examples: The officer in charge of the program, Colonel Eugene Holmes, told me he was taking me because I would be of greater service to the country as an officer than as a draftee.
No one tells a draftee which scouting events he should perform at and in what order.
The former Xavier University linebacker -- a onetime Dallas Cowboys draftee -- is used to the national spotlight.
Preparing and guiding a draftee through the process of scouting is the building block of any successful sports practice.
